section.title: NAME
section.p: removeProcedure - Deletes the specified function name.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Deletes the specified function name, function name must exist, otherwise an exception message.
Defined removeProcedure() method, only one string type parameter name function name, its value must already exits, otherwise an exception.

body.section:
Examples
Delete the sum function: db.removeProcedure("sum") Function must be guaranteed and consistent definition of the function name. Such as db.removeProcedure('sum') call will return a failure.
